chemistry_validity.status: external chemistry-validity backend on modular rollout candidates

docking_affinity.status: external docking backend on modular rollout candidates

pocket_compatibility.status: external pocket-compatibility backend on modular rollout candidates

claim_bearing_requirements: Keep chemistry validity, pocket compatibility, clash, and strict pocket-fit metrics above the shared backend thresholds.
Keep backend_missing_structure_fraction at or below 0.0 on claim-bearing reviewer surfaces.

planned_metric_interfaces.description: Backend-agnostic chemistry property interface reserved for future method comparison.
Backend-agnostic scaffold novelty interface reserved for future method comparison.

chemistry_novelty_diversity.interpretation: Review chemistry novelty/diversity on `inferred_bond_candidates`; novelty is measured against training-reference structural signatures instead of relying only on within-layer uniqueness.

benchmark_evidence.stronger_benchmark_note: This surface clears the stronger reviewer chemistry gate because parseable, finite-conformer, sanitized, and unique-SMILES fractions all pass with review_candidate_count=24 and novelty_diversity_score=1.0000.
external_required_checks: reviewer benchmark-plus chemistry gate already passed
benchmark_evidence.external_benchmark_note: This surface does not yet clear the explicit external benchmark-dataset chemistry tier; support is 0.833 and requires a configured benchmark dataset label, parsed_examples>=100, retained_label_coverage>=0.8, held-out family counts>=10 on validation/test, and reviewer benchmark-plus chemistry already passing.
benchmark_evidence.interpretation: Combines backend-backed chemistry quality, held-out-pocket novelty/diversity aggregates, and explicit reviewer benchmark checks (validity_quality_score=1.0000, novelty_diversity_score=1.0000, support_score=1.0000) for a stronger reviewer benchmark-plus chemistry summary.

prerequisites: Use the canonical experiment config that enables the external chemistry, docking, and pocket backends.
Run `python3 tools/reviewer_env_check.py --config <experiment-config>` before reviewer revalidation on a fresh machine.
Ensure `python3` can execute `tools/rdkit_validity_backend.py` and `tools/pocket_contact_backend.py` from the repository root.
Keep source protein and ligand structure provenance available in the configured dataset so backend scoring does not degrade into missing-structure examples.

docking_backend.status: external docking backend on modular rollout candidates

pocket_backend.status: external pocket-compatibility backend on modular rollout candidates

reranker_report.decision: calibrated reranking did not dominate deterministic selection; expand backend-scored calibration evidence before considering adversarial training

reviewer_reasons: test leakage proxy 0.1218 exceeds the hard reviewer bound 0.1200
leakage_calibration.decision: 0 reviewed variant(s) regress pocket fit or chemistry; keep leakage at or below the current default until a sweep clears these blockers
